title: Prototype Protocol
author: George Moberly
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.73yhqpw

steps.title: Add 200 μl SWS to the tube
steps.instruction: Add 200 μl SWS to the tube. Pipette to mix.

steps.title: Place on the 50°C heat block for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Place on the 50°C heat block for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Immediately place on a magnetic stand...
steps.instruction: Immediately place on a magnetic stand and wait until the liquid is clear (~2 minutes).

steps.title: Remove and discard all supernatant from the tube
steps.instruction: Remove and discard all supernatant from the tube.

steps.title: Remove from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnetic stand. 1. Add 200 μl SWS to the tube. Pipette to mix.
